title: Nothing Ends in War and Peace
subtitle: Tolstoy wrote a novel about war, history, love, death, and redemption, only to arrive at the unsettling possibility that life never really resolves at all.

title: Ankara Messi
subtitle: From despair to belief in thirteen unforgettable minutes.
preview: It has been quite some time since I wrote anything. I have not been religiously following this FIFA World Cup as I used to. Oh, I am, but not as much as I used to. I watch all of Argentina's matches,…

title: The Last Dance
subtitle: The final World Cup of football’s greatest generation
preview: As the internet romantically calls it, “The Last Dance” begins tomorrow. Messi and Ronaldo may never play another FIFA World Cup. This is it. Thus begins the last dance. By the time I wake up…
